purpose: Lock the operator release chain so tags, releases, packaged artifacts, and finality guards cannot silently drift after publication.
invariants: every protected release tag resolves to its recorded commit
every protected release has a non-draft, non-prerelease GitHub release
packaged operator-surface releases expose release assets
main descends from every protected release tag
release integrity assertion is runnable locally and in GitHub Actions
v0.9.1 remains the base for v1.0.0 perimeter admission
